title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: [Critique] result: **this is real credit exhaustion, not account/profile mismatch**. - **Signal comparison (strong):** the current 429 run records `[ERROR] Network error: API 429: credit limit exceeded` and `type: manus-provider-quota` in inspection.([delivery-gate.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-recheck/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json#L20-L22))([inspection-report.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-recheck/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json#L5-L10)) - **Earlier Manus success contrast:** older runs on the clean artifact set used the same renderer path (`manus-nanobanana`) and reached artifacts (preview-only or full PPTX/PDF), with no 429 errors.([variant-fixed/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/slide-prod-verify-manus-clean-20260318163230/variant-fixed/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json#L3-L24))([variant-fixed-4/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/slide-prod-verify-manus-clean-20260318163230/variant-fixed-4/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json#L2-L27)) - **Mismatch-specific patterns are absent:** no `401/403/unauthorized/auth` class errors were found in the 429 artifacts, and the 429 log path shows the same execution mode/profile metadata (`content-only`, `nano-banana`) as expected for these Manus runs.([delivery-recheck/inspection-report.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-recheck/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json#L8-L10))([manus-escalated.stderr.log](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/slide-prod-verify-manus-clean-20260318163230/manus-escalated.stderr.log#L2-L7)) - **Pre-check policy gate still possible:** the earlier medical `delivery/` attempt failed on content policy (`Sensitive content detected: medical`), which is a different block type and not quota/account behavior.([delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json#L4-L22)) For account mismatch hypothesis to be credible, we would expect auth/credential-specific errors or repeated failures across attempts in similar/short tasks; the data instead aligns with **provider quota exhaustion at invocation time**.
